title: Review externalized configuration Phase 2 implementation
description: Review all changes from Phase 2 for correctness, completeness against the spec, and absence of regressions. Verify that no hardcoded binary paths, flags, or allowed-tools strings remain in runner.py or cli.py. Confirm backward compatibility for test fixtures. Check that structural flags are not externalized.
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded binary names (codex, claude) remain as CLI invocation targets in runner.py or cli.py
No hardcoded flags (--skip-git-repo-check, --full-auto, --color never, --dangerously-skip-permissions) remain in runner.py
No hardcoded --allowedTools string remains in runner.py
Backward compatibility path exists for runner construction without config
All acceptance criteria from the spec are met
